command: env PYTHONPATH=outputs/code python outputs/code/scripts/write_benchmark_deep_metrics.py --corpus ifn-pilot --baseline-dir outputs/results/ifn-pilot/baselines --harmonized data/deg/harmonized/ifn-pilot_harmonized.csv --gold data/studies/gold/ifn_gold_panel.csv --gold-gene-column gene_symbol --piper-score-csv outputs/results/ifn-pilot/piper_gene_scores.csv --output-dir outputs/results/ifn-pilot/deep-metrics --title 'IFN deep benchmark metrics' --min-studies 2 --max-k 1000 --n-bootstrap 10 --bootstrap-methods piper_quality_weighted_score weighted_stouffer fisher --seed 1729
